excluded: IBM credit or provider availability validation
a publication-ready noisy-hardware robustness or auditability claim
supported: simulated-only shot-resolution audit of Stage154 recommended hardware targets
target filtering that requires PhaseWrap's positional and control margins to clear at least two shot quanta
provider-level hardware-probe recommendation only when stable targets appear on both fixed-width templates

next_gate: If the user accepts the stable simulated target, pause before hardware execution to verify IBM credit/provider state together; otherwise broaden the simulated seed/noise sweep before any live spend.
objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
